limitation: Depth-free calibrated multi-view mask fitting. This is an approximate video-derived pose, not RGB-D ICP or GT.

external_references.name: Calibrated multi-view silhouette fitting
external_references.role: Depth-free pose evidence from synchronized masks and calibrated cameras; used here as the current-data fallback.

external_references.name: 3D Gaussian Splatting
external_references.role: Future multi-view video reconstruction/tracking option; not used in this lightweight baseline.

external_references.name: Nerfstudio
external_references.role: Future NeRF/3DGS tooling option for longer multi-view fitting jobs.
